  - Role: Hardware Integration & Testing

- **Miguel** (@Biltes)

## Daily Log Rotation Schedule

The team follows a 6-week rotating schedule where Afonso covers for one person each week:

| Week | Monday | Tuesday | Wednesday | Thursday | Friday | Person Off |
|------|--------|---------|-----------|----------|--------|------------|
| **Week 1** | Gaspar | Hugo | Melanie | Bernardo | Miguel | **Afonso** |
| **Week 2** | **Afonso** | Hugo | Melanie | Bernardo | Miguel | Gaspar |
| **Week 3** | Gaspar | **Afonso** | Melanie | Bernardo | Miguel | Hugo |
| **Week 4** | Gaspar | Hugo | **Afonso** | Bernardo | Miguel | Melanie |
| **Week 5** | Gaspar | Hugo | Melanie | **Afonso** | Miguel | Bernardo |
| **Week 6** | Gaspar | Hugo | Melanie | Bernardo | **Afonso** | Miguel |

**Cycle repeats after Week 6.**

### Determining Current Week
- **Week 1 Start Date**: February 23, 2026 (Monday)
- Calculate weeks since start date to determine current week in cycle
- Formula: `((weeks_since_feb_23_2026) % 6) + 1`
